title: Mage Buff applies AL SPD and dice bonuses

card.rawText: AL: +3. SPD: +3. Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Hit Dice Rolls: +1.

effect.value: AL +3; SPD +3; Atk Dice Rolls +1; Hit Dice Rolls +1

plan.title: Mage Buff applies AL SPD and dice bonuses
plan.summary: Equip Mage Buff to a primary creature and verify its printed AL, SPD, and attack dice bonuses.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the bonuses come only from Mage Buff.

steps: Player 1 plays Mage Buff and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective AL, SPD, and attack dice.
manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Roll is shown in battle UI.
riskNotes: Hit Dice Rolls are not directly exposed by the current effective stat helper.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Mage Buff equipped stat modifier.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
